_comment: Two-track Job Hunt OS config. Every job is scored against BOTH tracks. If both clear threshold, the digest flags it as a dual match and you pick the resume. Tailoring skill uses track.resume_path. Edit anytime.

candidate.name: Juhi Jain
candidate.status: Open to work. Left LG Ad Solutions Apr 2026 for a deliberate transition into AI-first product roles.

shared.remote_preference: Remote preferred. Hybrid or relocation acceptable only for top-tier AI companies (e.g. SF-based labs).
shared.role_priority: Visibility and impact over title or IC-vs-manager track.

salary.note: 200k TC floor applies to BOTH tracks. Flexible below floor only for dream-tier AI labs.

dual_match_behavior: If a job clears threshold on both tracks, flag it in the digest as DUAL MATCH and let Juhi pick the resume. Do not auto-select.

ai.label: AI PM (adtech or non-adtech)
ai.positioning: AI-first, domain-agnostic 0-to-1 builder now building agentic AI systems hands-on.
ai.domain_preference: Domain-agnostic. AI must be core to the product, not a bolt-on.
dealbreakers: AI is marketing only: thin wrapper, not building with models
PM is order-taker; metrics hidden in a data science black box
No AI in the core product

adtech.label: Adtech PM
adtech.positioning: Programmatic CTV and identity 0-to-1 builder with $400M business ownership and deep marketplace expertise.
adtech.domain_preference: Adtech, RMN, programmatic, CTV, identity, marketplace, supply-demand platforms.
dealbreakers: Pure sales or account management role, not product
No 0-to-1 or platform scope; pure maintenance

company_profile.stage: Series B+ startups (post-PMF, scaling) OR established 1,000 to 10,000 person companies with a startup mindset
company_profile.avoid: Massive enterprises, slow-moving orgs, non-AI-forward legacy companies
